name: 2-amino-2-deoxy-D-gluconi… to 2-dehydro-3-deoxy-D-arabi…
summary: A 16-step route from 2-amino-2-deoxy-D-gluconic acid zwitterion to 2-dehydro-3-deoxy-D-arabinonate, ingested from Rhea. Every step is curated by Rhea and independently verified here to balance in mass and charge.

reactions.name: glyceraldehyde-3-phosphate dehydrogenase (phosphorylating)
reactions.equation: D-glyceraldehyde 3-phosphate + phosphate + NAD(+) = (2R)-3-phospho-glyceroyl phosphate + NADH + H(+)

reactions.name: N-acylneuraminate-9-phosphate synthase
reactions.equation: an N-acyl-D-mannosamine 6-phosphate + phosphoenolpyruvate + H2O = an N-acylneuraminate 9-phosphate + phosphate

reactions.name: N-acylneuraminate-9-phosphatase
reactions.equation: an N-acylneuraminate 9-phosphate + H2O = an N-acylneuraminate + phosphate

reactions.name: N-acylneuraminate cytidylyltransferase
reactions.equation: an N-acylneuraminate + CTP = a CMP-N-acyl-beta-neuraminate + diphosphate

reactions.name: CMP-N-acylneuraminate phosphodiesterase
reactions.equation: a CMP-N-acyl-beta-neuraminate + H2O = an N-acylneuraminate + CMP + H(+)

reactions.name: ribose 1-dehydrogenase (NADP(+))
reactions.equation: D-ribose + NADP(+) + H2O = D-ribonate + NADPH + 2 H(+)

reactions.name: phenylalanine--tRNA ligase
reactions.equation: tRNA(Phe) + L-phenylalanine + ATP = L-phenylalanyl-tRNA(Phe) + AMP + diphosphate + H(+)

reactions.name: beta-galactoside alpha-2,3-sialyltransferase
reactions.equation: a beta-D-galactosyl-(1->3)-N-acetyl-alpha-D-galactosaminyl derivative + CMP-N-acetyl-beta-neuraminate = an N-acetyl-alpha-neuraminyl-(2->3)-beta-D-galactosyl-(1->3)-N-acetyl-alpha-D-galactosaminyl derivative + CMP + H(+)

reactions.name: purine nucleosidase
reactions.equation: a purine D-ribonucleoside + H2O = a purine nucleobase + D-ribose

reactions.name: beta-nicotinamide D-riboside + H2O = D-ribose + nicotinamide + H(+)
reactions.equation: beta-nicotinamide D-riboside + H2O = D-ribose + nicotinamide + H(+)
